name: AWS Billing and Cost Management Service Unsuccessful Enumeration Attempt
description: Detected unsuccessful enumeration of AWS Billing and Cost Management service which might indicate an attacker trying to collect info on targeted AWS account for pending details, resource usage, IDs, allocation tags, and basic resource info to check if the organization is worth targeting.
